title: Bridge Essay: How Embodied Cognition Affects Vocal Performance: An Integrative Review.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** 4E cognition — embodied, embedded, enactive, extended mind.

**How Embodied Cognition Affects Vocal Performance: An Integrative Review.**. Journal of voice: official journal of the Voice Foundation.. PMID: 41318307. DOI: 10.1016/j.jvoice.2025.11.005. Embodied cognition-the view that cognitive processes are grounded in bodily sensation, action, and environmental interaction-offers atransformative lens for understanding vocal performance. This integrative review synthesizes interdisciplinary research to map key mechanisms, empirical applications, and gaps in the literature on embodied vocal practices.
